About the League

MORE THAN JUST A GAME

The KYAMSEC League is a football alumni league for Kyamuhunga Secondary School — bringing together old boys and girls from every generation. Each team represents a cohort, grouped by the year they joined Senior One. Season One kicks off at Mbarara City Stadium.

KYAMSEC LEAGUE
Kyamuhunga Secondary School • Season One • Mbarara City Stadium
"Strong teams don't just play… they represent."
All Cohorts

Who We Are

ABOUT KYAMSEC LEAGUE

🏫 Our Story

The KYAMSEC League was born out of a desire to reconnect alumni of Kyamuhunga Secondary School through the beautiful game. Every student who passed through those gates belongs to a cohort — and every cohort has a team. From the Class of 2000 to the Class of 2021, this league is for everyone.

⚽ Backbenchers FC — Class of 2013

📋 Registration Requirements

  • 1 Each team must have a unique name and official logo
  • 2 Minimum 11 players, maximum 25 + fans
  • 3 All players must be verified former students
  • 4 Each team must include at least one female player
  • 5 Non-refundable registration fee of UGX 300,000
  • 6 Complete branded uniform with visible numbers required
  • 7 Teams must follow all league rules and respect officials
  • 8 No late registrations accepted after deadline

🏟️ Venue & Details

Season One will be hosted at Mbarara City Stadium. Match days will feature a Family Fun Zone, Food Stalls, and Live DJ. The inaugural season kicks off at Mbarara City Stadium.

REGISTER YOUR TEAM

Registration Fee: UGX 300,000 (non-refundable)  •  Min Players: 11  •  Max Players: 25  •  Must include at least 1 female player
📋

DOWNLOAD REGISTRATION FORM

Download the official PDF registration form, fill it in, and submit it to the organizing committee together with your registration fee.

HOW TO REGISTER

  1. Download the PDF form below
  2. Print and fill in all required details
  3. Attach a list of all your players (if more than 15)
  4. Pay the registration fee of UGX 300,000
  5. Submit the completed form to the organizing committee
⬇ Download Registration Form (PDF)

PDF format  •  Print & fill by hand  •  Submit to organizing committee
